ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the transaction */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who purchased the service */,
  "work_order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the work order */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number associated with the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service or product */,
  "type_of_service" TEXT /* Type of service provided */,
  "total_sales_value" REAL /* Total sales value of the transaction */,
  "part_cost" REAL /* Cost of parts used in the service */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Cost of labor for the service */,
  "other_cost" REAL /* Other costs associated with the service */,
  "node" TEXT /* Node where the service was delivered */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., Only UM, Professional Sales) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the service or product */,
  "customer_po" TEXT /* Customer purchase order number */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source of the transaction */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Pending, Overdue) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_node FOREIGN KEY ("node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_work_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_order_id") REFERENCES work_orders ("work_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_request_type FOREIGN KEY ("request_type") REFERENCES requests ("request_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_part_number FOREIGN KEY ("part_number") REFERENCES parts ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the salesperson belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the salesperson (e.g., Sales Representative, Sales Manager) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the salesperson */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the salesperson */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the salesperson record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the salesperson record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "cust_code" TEXT /* Customer code assigned by the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the customer's organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to (e.g., Education, Government) */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the customer */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the customer's organization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the customer record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the customer record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_orders" (
  "work_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work order */,
  "work_order_number" TEXT /* Work order number assigned by the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the work order (e.g., Open, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the work order was created */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date the work order was completed */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the work order (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User assigned to the work order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the work order */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the work order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_orders_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_orders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number assigned by the company */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., Unpaid, Paid, Overdue) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was paid */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., Net 30, Net 60) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the part */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the part (e.g., each, per unit) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part (in days) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the part record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the part record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request type */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., Only UM, Professional Sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the request type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the request type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the request type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., TMS, CRM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data source */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node (e.g., DPS-JOPL) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the node */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the node */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id")
)
